languages.text: Hit form this pistol increases power of every DoT on the target by 5. Doent' stak

traits.locale_text: Hit form this pistol increases power of every DoT on the target by 5. Doent' stak

languages.text: The first hit per target from this pistol increases the level of damage-over-time effects the target is already suffering by +5. Does not trigger again for new effects inflicted on the same target after the first hit. Does not stack.

traits.locale_text: Every hit from this pistol increases the level of damage-over-time-effects suffered by the target by +5. Does not stack.
Every hit from this pistol increases the level of damage-over-time-effects suffered by the target by +5. Does not stack.

Every hit from this pistol increases the level of damage-over-time effects suffered by the target by +5. Does not stack.

languages.text: El primer impacto de esta pistola contra cada objetivo incrementa en +5 el nivel de los efectos de daño continuado que esté sufriendo dicho objetivo. Esto no se aplica a los nuevos efectos que se inflijan a ese mismo objetivo después del primer impacto. Este efecto no es acumulativo.
languages.original_text: The first hit per target from this pistol increases the level of damage-over-time effects the target is already suffering by +5. Does not trigger again for new effects inflicted on the same target after the first hit. Does not stack.

traits.locale_text: El primer impacto de esta pistola contra cada objetivo incrementa en +5 el nivel de los efectos de daño continuado que esté sufriendo dicho objetivo. Esto no se aplica a los nuevos efectos que se inflijan a ese mismo objetivo después del primer impacto. Este efecto no es acumulativo.

languages.text: このピストルが命中するたび、ターゲットが受ける継続ダメージ効果のレベルが+5増加する。この効果はスタックしない。
languages.original_text: Every hit from this pistol increases the level of damage-over-time effects suffered by the target by +5. Does not stack.

traits.locale_text: このピストルが命中するたび、ターゲットが受ける継続ダメージ効果のレベルが+5増加する。この効果はスタックしない。

languages.text: 该手枪首次命中每个目标时，该目标已有的所有持续伤害效果层数+5。对于同一目标，首次命中后再施加的新效果不再触发此加成。不可叠加。
languages.original_text: The first hit per target from this pistol increases the level of damage-over-time effects the target is already suffering by +5. Does not trigger again for new effects inflicted on the same target after the first hit. Does not stack.

traits.locale_text: 该手枪首次命中每个目标时，该目标已有的所有持续伤害效果层数+5。对于同一目标，首次命中后再施加的新效果不再触发此加成。不可叠加。

languages.text: Der erste Treffer pro Ziel mit dieser Pistole erhöht die Schaden-über-Zeit-Effekte, mit denen das Ziel bereits belegt ist, um +5. Wird nach dem ersten Treffer nicht erneut aktiviert, um dasselbe Ziel mit neuen Effekten zu belegen. Nicht stapelbar.
languages.original_text: The first hit per target from this pistol increases the level of damage-over-time effects the target is already suffering by +5. Does not trigger again for new effects inflicted on the same target after the first hit. Does not stack.

traits.locale_text: Der erste Treffer pro Ziel mit dieser Pistole erhöht die Schaden-über-Zeit-Effekte, mit denen das Ziel bereits belegt ist, um +5. Wird nach dem ersten Treffer nicht erneut aktiviert, um dasselbe Ziel mit neuen Effekten zu belegen. Nicht stapelbar.

languages.text: Le premier coup porté à chaque cible par ce pistolet augmente le niveau des effets de dégâts progressifs qu'elle subit déjà de +5. Les nouveaux effets infligés à la même cible lors des coups suivants ne sont pas affectés. Non cumulable.
languages.original_text: The first hit per target from this pistol increases the level of damage-over-time effects the target is already suffering by +5. Does not trigger again for new effects inflicted on the same target after the first hit. Does not stack.

traits.locale_text: Le premier coup porté à chaque cible par ce pistolet augmente le niveau des effets de dégâts progressifs qu'elle subit déjà de +5. Les nouveaux effets infligés à la même cible lors des coups suivants ne sont pas affectés. Non cumulable.

languages.text: Попадание из этого пистолета увеличивает уровень эффектов периодического урона, наложенных на цель, на 5. Эффект не суммируется.
languages.original_text: The first hit per target from this pistol increases the level of damage-over-time effects the target is already suffering by +5. Does not trigger again for new effects inflicted on the same target after the first hit. Does not stack.

traits.locale_text: Попадание из этого пистолета увеличивает уровень эффектов периодического урона, наложенных на цель, на 5. Эффект не суммируется.
Попадание из этого пистолета увеличивает уровень эффектов периодического урона, наложенных на цель, на 5. Эффект не суммируется.

languages.text: Bu tabancayla her bir hedefe yapılan ilk vuruş, hedefte hâlihazırda bulunan zamanla hasar veren etkinin seviyesini 5 puan artırır. İlk vuruştan sonra aynı hedefte oluşacak yeni etkilerde tekrar tetiklenmez. Etki üst üste birikmez.
